_global.text:
## Summary
Scaffold a NestJS + Prisma/PostgreSQL API and an Angular SPA implementing JWT email/password auth, per-user Recipe CRUD, and an admin recipe-count overview, branded "FaithfulF Recipe Box".

## Scope
Greenfield monorepo. Root layout: `backend/` (NestJS), `frontend/` (Angular), `docker-compose.yml`, per-service `Dockerfile`s.

### Files to create — Backend (`backend/`)
- `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `nest-cli.json` — NestJS project config.
- `prisma/schema.prisma` — `User` (id, email unique, passwordHash, role enum `USER|ADMIN`, createdAt) and `Recipe` (id, title, ingredients text, steps text, userId FK, timestamps).
- `prisma/seed.ts` — create demo `USER` and `ADMIN` (bcrypt-hashed passwords); print `SEED_CREDS_JSON={...}` to stdout.
- `src/main.ts` — bootstrap, global `/api` prefix, CORS for frontend origin, `ValidationPipe`.
- `src/app.module.ts` — wire modules.
- `src/prisma/prisma.service.ts` + `prisma.module.ts` — Prisma client provider.
- `src/auth/` — `auth.module.ts`, `auth.service.ts` (register/login, bcrypt, sign JWT), `auth.controller.ts` (`POST /api/auth/register`, `POST /api/auth/login`), `jwt.strategy.ts` (passport-jwt), `jwt-auth.guard.ts`, `roles.guard.ts` + `@Roles()` decorator, `dto/` (register, login DTOs with class-validator).
- `src/recipes/` — `recipes.module.ts`, `recipes.service.ts`, `recipes.controller.ts` (`GET/POST /api/recipes`, `GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/recipes/:id`), `dto/` create/update. All routes `@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)`; queries scoped to `req.user.userId`; 404 on non-owned `:id`.
- `src/admin/` — `admin.module.ts`, `admin.controller.ts` (`GET /api/admin/overview`, guarded by `JwtAuthGuard` + `RolesGuard('ADMIN')`), `admin.service.ts` (group recipe counts per user).
- `src/health/health.controller.ts` — `GET /api/health` (liveness), `GET /api/health/deep` (Prisma `SELECT 1`). Both public.
- `.env` / `.env.example` — `DATABASE_URL`, `JWT_SECRET`, `PORT=3000`.
- `Dockerfile` — multi-stage build; runs `prisma migrate deploy` + `prisma db seed` then `node dist/main`.

### Files to create — Frontend (`frontend/`)
- Angular workspace (`package.json`, `angular.json`, `tsconfig*.json`).
- `src/index.html` — `<title>FaithfulF Recipe Box</title>`.
- `src/app/app.component.*` — header with **FaithfulF Recipe Box** branding + logout button.
- `src/app/app.routes.ts` — routes below.
- `src/app/core/auth.service.ts` — register/login, store JWT in `localStorage`, expose role.
- `src/app/core/auth.interceptor.ts` — attach `Authorization: Bearer`.
- `src/app/core/auth.guard.ts` (authenticated) and `admin.guard.ts` (role ADMIN).
- `src/app/core/recipe.service.ts` + `admin.service.ts` — HTTP clients.
- Feature components: `login`, `signup`, `recipe-list` (renders items with `data-testid="recipe-item"`), `recipe-form` (create/edit), `admin-overview` (table with `data-testid="admin-overview"`).
- `environments/environment*.ts` — API base URL.
- `Dockerfile` — build Angular, serve `dist/` via nginx; nginx proxies `/api` → backend.

### Files to create — Root
- `docker-compose.yml` — `postgres`, `backend`, `frontend` services.

### Dependencies
- Backend: `@nestjs/*`, `@nestjs/jwt`, `@nestjs/passport`, `passport`, `passport-jwt`, `prisma`, `@prisma/client`, `bcrypt`, `class-validator`, `class-transformer`.
- Frontend: Angular 17+ (standalone components, router, `HttpClient`).

### Assumptions
- JWT via Bearer header; token in `localStorage`; role embedded in JWT payload. (Stack-appropriate for Angular+NestJS.)
- Admin is assigned via the `role` field seeded in `prisma/seed.ts`; public signup always creates `USER` (spec seeds an explicit Admin rather than first-user-admin).
- Recipe `:id` not owned by caller → 404 (avoids leaking existence); admin routes → 403 for non-admin.
- Public routes: `/login`, `/signup`, `/api/health`, `/api/health/deep`, `/api/auth/*`. All other API/app routes guarded.
- `ingredients`/`steps` stored as free text (spec: "text").

## Implementation Plan

### Step 1: Backend scaffold + Prisma
Init NestJS, define `schema.prisma` (User/Recipe/Role), configure `PrismaService`, create initial migration.

### Step 2: Auth module
Implement register (bcrypt hash) and login (verify, sign JWT with `{sub, email, role}`). Add `JwtStrategy`, `JwtAuthGuard`, `RolesGuard` + `@Roles()`.

### Step 3: Recipes module
CRUD controller/service, all guarded, scoped to `req.user.sub`. Validate DTOs (title/ingredients/steps required).

### Step 4: Admin module
`GET /api/admin/overview` guarded by JWT + `RolesGuard('ADMIN')`; returns `[{ email, recipeCount }]` via Prisma groupBy/count.

### Step 5: Health + seed
Add health endpoints. Write `seed.ts` emitting `SEED_CREDS_JSON`; wire `prisma db seed`.

### Step 6: Angular scaffold + auth
Create workspace, `AuthService`, `authInterceptor`, `authGuard`/`adminGuard`. Set title/header branding to "FaithfulF Recipe Box".

### Step 7: Routes & components
Routes (all navigable states URL-addressable):
- `/login`, `/signup` — public.
- `/recipes` — list (authGuard), items `data-testid="recipe-item"`.
- `/recipes/new` — create form (authGuard).
- `/recipes/:id/edit` — edit form (authGuard).
- `/admin` — overview (adminGuard), table `data-testid="admin-overview"`.
- `''` → redirect `/recipes`; `**` → redirect.
Delete confirmation as `?modal=delete&id=` on the list route (deep-linkable).

### Step 8: Docker + compose
Write both Dockerfiles, nginx `/api` proxy, and `docker-compose.yml` (postgres + backend + frontend). Backend entrypoint runs `migrate deploy` + seed.

## Testing Strategy
- **Auth 401:** `GET /api/recipes` with no token → 401 (JwtAuthGuard).
- **CRUD:** register/login → create "Banitsa" → `GET /api/recipes` returns it; UI shows `data-testid="recipe-item"`.
- **Ownership:** second user cannot GET/edit/delete first user's recipe (404).
- **Admin 403:** non-admin `GET /api/admin/overview` → 403.
- **Admin 200:** seeded admin login → `/admin` renders `data-testid="admin-overview"` with per-user counts.
- **Health:** `GET /api/health` → 200; `/api/health/deep` → 200 with DB reachable.
- **Branding:** page title and header contain "FaithfulF".

## Risks
- Prisma migrate/seed must run before backend serves in Docker — enforce in entrypoint ordering.
- nginx `/api` proxy target must match backend service name/port in compose.
- Ensure `JWT_SECRET` is set in all environments; missing secret breaks token verification silently.
